creator: gemellus@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
> Also please be aware of the fact, you're running a soon to be EOL'd 
> version of FreeBSD and should consider upgrading your system to either 6.3-R 
> or 7.0-R

What I want to know is: is 865G supported at all on FreeBSD 6.1-R?

I am using the stock Xorg version (the one installed by default).

Unfortunately, I don't have access to the FreeBSD machine at the moment, so I can't provide 
the necessary kldstat/pciconf info yet, but thanks for the help.  I'll do it as soon as I 
can.
